series_metadata.series_description: Records related to the collateral provided by banks to secure TCDRS cash balances. Includes collateral agreements and monthly collateral reports.
Records documenting the purchase, sale, and improvement of real property and equipment, as well as depreciation, amortization, etc. Includes appropriation for expense and fixed assets.

tracking_data.comments:
TCDRS LA + 4 retention period
exceeds TSL LA + 3 for internal
business practices.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to general accounting functions not covered elsewhere. These may include records related to miscellaneous accounting services provided to other departments, trouble- shooting, and special accounting projects.
Records related to the review and management of the TCDRS interfund accounting process used to transfer monies between the trust fund and the expense fund.
Records that document unclaimed balances related to inactive member accounts.

tracking_data.comments:
Property Code 74.103 does not
apply to TCDRS.

series_metadata.series_title: Accounts Payable Information Payments to Members - Plan Administration
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to payments to members of Plan-related financial obligations.

tracking_data.comments:
TCDRS FE + 4 retention period
exceeds TSL FE + 3 for internal
business practices.

series_metadata.series_title: Office Procedures Department - Organization and Tracking
series_metadata.series_description: These records are organizational in nature and are used to document and track department functions, workflow, etc. Does not include documents subject to a different retention code. Example: agency rules, policies, and procedure (1.1.070, AUD1060A).

series_metadata.series_title: Plans and Planning Records Internal Project Management
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to the management of internal projects, special studies, analyses, and other department events not covered elsewhere. Includes adhoc studies performed at the organization or work group level. Includes notes, presentations, reports, studies, project plans, meeting minutes, status reporting, etc. Excludes pending legislation projects.

tracking_data.comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: Data processing
planning records are not archival.
See 1.1.027 for Proposed
Legislation.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to internal postal operations. Includes the postal logs.

series_metadata.series_title: Security Access Records Physical Access Records
series_metadata.series_description: Records relating to the request and the issuance of physical access to the TCDRS building and grounds. Includes signed statements or similar instruments requesting access and documents granting access of keys, building fobs, parking passes, etc.

tracking_data.comments: Vital Record

series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting vehicle ownership, and licensing. Records include vehicle titles and registration.

tracking_data.comments:
Note: These records are necessary
only in regards to an accident.

series_metadata.series_title: Audits External Audits - Audit Workpapers and Reports
series_metadata.series_description: Audits and reviews performed by or on behalf of TCDRS, including the working papers that support the audit. Also includes audits performed on TCDRS.

tracking_data.comments:
Note: The State Auditor's Office
retains any copies of its audits
performed on Texas state agencies.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to internal operational audits and data reviews including quality assurance audits and other internal non- financial operational audits.
Reports projecting life expectancy, future benefits, and other information needed to calculate contributions and provisions of TCDRS pension programs.
Records related to the rules used to complete actuarial evaluations. Includes the actuarial cost methods.

Records related to individual member and beneficiary annuitants. Includes active and inactive members records transferred to the annuitant file as well as other retirement documentation. Does not include processing of member transactions or disability medical records.

tracking_data.comments:
See BEN1140 for Member File -
Active/Inactive. See BEN1160 for
Member File - Disability Retirement
Medical Records. See BEN1200 for
Members - Retirement Processing.
See BEN1220 for Members -
Transaction Processing. See
BEN1240 for Members -
Withdrawal Processing.

series_metadata.series_description: Payroll data and related records transferred from employers to TCDRS. Does not include processing documentation.

tracking_data.comments:
See BEN1120 for Employers -
Payroll Processing.

series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting an employer's narrative, including creations documents, census data, prior services, orders and resolutions regarding retirement plans, plan provisions, changes or potential changes to plans, annual plan documents, and general correspondence, etc. Any record related to the employer's status within TCDRS. Does not include contribution rates calculations, employer payroll reports and processing, or documents considered part of the official member, annuitant record.

tracking_data.comments:
See BEN1300 for Rates and
Calculation factors; BEN1060 and
BEN1120 for employer payroll;
BEN1040 and BEN1140 for
Member and Annuitant records.

series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting the receipt and processing of employer payroll information. Does not include payroll data.

tracking_data.comments:
See BEN1060 for Employers -
Employer Payroll.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to individual employee members, including account status, service credit, deposits and deductions, and estimates of retirement benefits. Includes active and inactive members. Does not include processing of member transactions, annuitant files, and disability medical records.

tracking_data.comments:
See BEN1040 for Annuitant File.
See BEN1160 for Member File -
Disability Retirement Medical
Records. See BEN1200 for
Members - Retirement Processing.
See BEN1220 for Members -
Transaction Processing. See
BEN1240 for Members -
Withdrawal Processing.

series_metadata.series_title: Member File - Disability Retirement Medical Records
series_metadata.series_description: Medical records submitted to support the decision making process of a members disability retirement. Includes the medical board decision and supporting medical records.
Records related to the month-end balancing of withdrawal and annuity payments made on employee accounts. Includes withdrawal transfer reports, annuity change reports, and the hold report.
Records related to processing benefits for System members who are deceased or have retired and are receiving benefits. Does not include Retirement Number logs or the annuitants file.

tracking_data.comments: See BEN1040 for Annuitant File.

series_metadata.series_description: Records used to balance member employee accounts or to update service credit prior to distribution to individual member files.
Records related to processing applications for withdrawals to individual accounts of members who are no longer participants in TCDRS.
Reports and related records used to provide information on the management of member benefits.

tracking_data.comments:
AV to be determined by Director of
Member Services

series_metadata.series_title: Plan Administration - Prospective Employers - Non Participating
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to prospective employers communications and documents used in the determination of benefit eligibility. Includes all employers that did not become a participating employer. Excludes any employer who is a current member or joined TCDRS.

tracking_data.comments:
See BEN1100 for Employers -
Original Orders and Resolutions.

series_metadata.series_title: Plan Administration - Rates and Calculation Factors
series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting rates and calculations related to plan administration.
Records related to the production of routine and special reports requested by employers.
Records related to the production of internal routine reports requested by TCDRS staff. Includes benefit plan actuarial reports use for benefit plan development.

tracking_data.comments:
AV to be determined by Director of
Actuarial Services

series_metadata.series_description: Listings and reports on member employees terminated from the System. Does not include terminated member file.

tracking_data.comments:
See BEN1140 for Member File -
Active and Inactive.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to year end processing and schedules. Includes production of estimates of retirement benefits for participating members' annual statement. Does not include individual member statements, which are in the member file. Includes annual statement testing plan, meeting notes, and processing schedules.

tracking_data.comments:
See BEN1140 for Member File -
Active and Inactive.

series_metadata.series_description: Publications in any format produced internally by or externally for TCDRS (or are required to be distributed under law by the System) and are publicly distributed. Note: A state publication includes but is not limited to: distribution in print, on microfilm, as audiovisual material, as interactive media or on electronic external storage device, as an on-line publication, which is an index to other on-line publications, as a text, graphic, or other digital file, or as a user interface to a computer database.
series_metadata.legal_citation:
Tex Gov't Code
441.101 - 441.106;
Requirement for
Internet publication
see 13TAC§§3.1 -
3.16

tracking_data.comments:
CAUTION: Many state publications
must be submitted to the Texas
State Publications Depository
Program, Texas State Library and
Archives Commission. The Texas
State Library and Archives
Commission will retain a copy of all
state publications submitted to it
on a continuing basis, subject to
periodic evaluation to determine if
the publication merits further
retention. Also see EXE1080 for
Comprehensive Annual Financial
Statements and ADM1320 for
Strategic Plans. See 2.1.007 for
interactive functions of website
such as Benefits Calculator.

series_metadata.series_title: Training Materials Training and Development Programs - Employers and Members
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to TCDRS efforts to provide awareness, education, and training to employers and members regarding plan features such as employer contributions rates and member benefits, and other TCDRS services. Includes attendance lists, communications, presentations delivered through annual conference, employer visits, and member visits, webinars, and other educational methods. Does not include documents considered part of the official member, annuitant or employer record.

tracking_data.comments:
TCDRS AC + 3 retention period
exceeds TSL US + 1 for internal
business practices.

series_metadata.series_title: Mail and Telecommunication Listings General Mailings
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to TCDRS mailings. Any general mass mailing and individual customized mailing created as an activity, event, campaign from marketing software or third party printer to members, annuitants, employers, etc. Documents include copy of the publication, list of recipients, and point of delivery. Does not include mailings considered part of the official member, annuitant or employer record.
Records related to appointments and termination of TCDRS Board of Trustees and Committees. These records also include the Board Governance and other Board policies documents.
Any document that initiates, rescinds, or amends a regulation, policy, or procedure that governs the programs, services, or projects of TCDRS.

tracking_data.comments: Vital Record

series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting TCDRS' creation, structure, governance, development, significant events, plan documents, and key staff. Includes the Comprehensive Annual Financial Report (CAFR), enabling statutes and rules, IRS Determination Letters, etc.

tracking_data.comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE: In the event that
the agency will no longer retain the
records of this series permanently,
after retention is met those records
will be transferred to the Archives
and Information Services Division,
Texas State Library and Archives
Commission.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to new trustee orientation, Pension Review Board (PRB) education requirements, and trustee fiduciary responsibilities.

series_metadata.series_title: Inspection Records Air Quality Testing and Monitoring
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to monitoring, testing, and assessment of the air in the TCDRS building for the presence of contaminants or pollutants.

tracking_data.comments:
CAUTION: Does not include
inspection reports of building
construction. See item number
5.2.028.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to the design and construction of TCDRS building. Includes design documents such as drawings, blueprints, construction reports, and construction testing records.

tracking_data.comments:
See also item number 5.1.001,
FAC1100A for Contracts and Leases
- Tenant Leasing Proposals and
5.1.001, LEG1060B for Contracts
and Leases - Real Estate Leases and
5.2.028 for Building Construction
Contracts and Inspections Records
Vital Record

series_metadata.series_title: Equipment Manuals Maintenance Manuals and Technical Reference
series_metadata.series_description: Reference and technical instruction manuals provided by the manufacturer for products and building equipment used by TCDRS. Includes manuals and technical references for copiers, fax machines, postage meter, department equipment.

series_metadata.series_title: Equipment History File Equipment Maintenance and Repair
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to routine and/or general maintenance and repair of building equipment. Records include equipment histories and work orders.

tracking_data.comments:
For service agreements or
contracts related to equipment
maintenance, repairs and service,
retain in accordance with item
number 5.1.001.

series_metadata.series_title: Building Construction Contract and Inspection Records
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to construction and improvement contracts and agreements for improvement to real property. Includes all construction and property improvements bid documentation. Includes construction inspection documents. Also includes disputes that do not progress to litigation and claims.

tracking_data.comments:
See also item number 5.1.001,
FAC1100A for Contracts and Leases
- Tenant Leasing Proposals and
5.1.001, LEG1060B for Contracts
and Leases - Real Estate Leases and
5.2.002 for Building Construction
Project Files Vital Record

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to the valuation of real property. These records may be used to evaluate real estate acquisitions. Includes land and building appraisals. Does not include contracts and agreements.

tracking_data.comments:
TCDRS AC + 4 retention period
exceeds TSL AV for internal
business practices. See 4.7.004 for
Contracts and Agreements - Real
Estate Purchase and Sale. Vital
Record

series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting the monthly building operations. Report by the TCDRS management agency. The report generally includes the receipt of security deposits from tenants, tenant rent roll, general management and maintenance expenses.
Records related to the evacuation of the TCDRS building in cases of emergency. Includes any information of emergency preparedness.

tracking_data.comments:
TCDRS US + 1 retention period
exceeds TSL US for internal
business practices.

series_metadata.series_title: Employee Insurance Records Benefit Enrollment and Participation - Disability Benefits
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to the application of continuing benefits distributed under ERS long term or short term disability benefit plans or the TCDRS short term disability benefit. Includes disability benefits review information, long-term benefit calculations, and appeals. Does not include disability retirement benefits granted by the TCDRS pension plan or medical records supporting a disability insurance claim.

tracking_data.comments:
CAUTION: Documents that serve as
payroll deduction authorizations
must maintained for the retention
period prescribed for item number
3.2.001. TCDRS AC + 4 retention
period exceeds TSL AC for internal
business practices. See HRB1160
for Employee Disability Insurance
Benefits - Medical Records,
BEN1160 for Member File -
Disability Retirement Medical
Records.

series_metadata.series_title: Employee Insurance Records Benefit Enrollment and Participation - General
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to the enrollment and participation of employees in TCDRS benefits programs.

tracking_data.comments:
CAUTION: Documents that serve as
payroll deduction authorizations
must maintained for the retention
period prescribed for item number
3.2.001. TCDRS AC + 4 retention
period exceeds TSL AC for internal
business practices. See HRB1060
for Benefit Enrollment and
Participation - Loan Applications,
HRB1080 for Benefit Enrollment
and Participation - Pension
Summary Records.

series_metadata.series_title: Employee Benefits - Other than Insurance Benefit Enrollment and Participation - Loan Applications
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to money borrowed by an employee against their 457 deferred compensation plan. Includes employee loan applications and related correspondence.

CAUTION: Documents that serve as
payroll deduction authorizations
must be maintained for the
retention period prescribed for
item number 3.2.001 TCDRS AC + 4
retention period exceeds TSL AC
for internal business practices. Vital
Record

series_metadata.series_title: Employee Benefits - Other than Insurance Benefit Enrollment and Participation - Pension Summary Records
series_metadata.series_description: Records summarizing employee enrollment and participation in TCDRS- sponsored pension program.

CAUTION: Documents that serve as
payroll deduction authorizations
must be maintained for the
retention period prescribed for
item number 3.2.001.TCDRS AC +
75 retention period exceeds TSL AC
+ 2 for internal business practices.

series_metadata.series_title: Employee Insurance Employee Disability Insurance Benefits - Medical Records
series_metadata.series_description: Medical records submitted to support the application and decision making process of a TCDRS employee's short term or long term disability insurance claim. Includes doctor statement and all supporting medical records. Excludes records related to disability retirement.

tracking_data.comments:
CAUTION: Documents that serve as
payroll deduction authorizations
must be maintained for the
retention period prescribed for
item number 3.2.001 TCDRS AC + 5
retention period exceeds TSL AC
for internal business practices. See
BEN1160 for Member File -
Disability Retirement Medical
Records.

series_metadata.series_title: Employee Benefits - Other than Insurance Health Reimbursement Account (HRA) Claims
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to claims filed by employees for payment from the TCDRS funded and administered Health Reimbursement Account (HRA). Includes fund accumulation and payment reports, claims forms, and supporting documentation.

tracking_data.comments:
CAUTION: Documents that serve as
payroll deduction authorization
must be maintained for the
retention period prescribed for
item number 3.2.001. TCDRS AC + 5
retention period exceeds TSL AC +
2 for internal business practices.
This is not insurance. Vital Record

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to the determination and monitoring of salary structures, incentive programs, and job classifications and placement. Includes incentive pay programs documentation and wage and benefit surveys.
Records related to employee announcements and other informative communications.

series_metadata.series_title: Applications for employment - Not Hired Employee Recruitment and Selection - Employee Recruitment Rejections
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to the recruitment of applicants for a particular position within TCDRS who are not hired or did not accept the position, including records related to the interview, pre-employment records, the documentation supporting the decision. Also includes employment applications and resumes.

tracking_data.comments:
TCDRS 3 yr retention period
exceeds TSL 2 yr for internal
business practices.

series_metadata.series_title: Employment Opportunity Announcements Employee Recruitment and Selection - General
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to open position announcements and/or advertisements and job descriptions. Includes internal and external postings.

tracking_data.comments:
TCDRS 3 yr retention period
exceeds TSL 2 for internal business
practices. See 3.1.014 HRE1060B

series_metadata.series_title: Employment Selection Records Employment Recruitment and Selection - General
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to interviews including questions asked, notes, and recordings - video and/or audio. Includes pre- employment records such as driving records, drug screenings, background checks, and/or exams, and all other records that document the selection process.

tracking_data.comments:
TCDRS 3 yr retention period
exceeds TSL 2 for internal business
practices. See 3.1.012 HRE1060A
Contains records found within
records series 3.1.026 Criminal
History Checks Vital Record

series_metadata.series_title: Personnel Corrective Action Documentation Employee Situations
series_metadata.series_description: Corrective actions are those actions which do not affect pay, status, or tenure and are imposed to correct or improve an employee's job performance.

tracking_data.comments:
CAUTION: If during the retention
period of this records series, any
part of this series issued to
document and support personnel
disciplinary action under item
number 3.1.021, all documentation
from this series used to support
disciplinary action must be retained
for the minimum retention period
described by item number 3.1.021.
See 3.1.018 HRE1080A, 3.1.021
HRE1080C

series_metadata.series_title: Personnel Disciplinary Action Documentation Employee Situations
series_metadata.series_description: Disciplinary actions are those actions which may affect pay, status, or tenure. They are imposed to discipline an employee whose conduct is harmful to the best interests of the state, the agency, or the employee work force, and for failure to improve performance or conduct following imposition of corrective action. May include cause for demotion, suspension, or dismissal, and the reasons for failure to give written notice of resignation. May also be used to document evidence of employee self- improvement efforts, as well as favorable and unfavorable communication.

tracking_data.comments:
See 3.1.08 HRE1080A, 3.1.020
HRE1080B Vital Record

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to TCDRS compliance with its equal employment policies. Includes reports which TCDRS is required to file with the Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) Commission identifying the workforce demographics.

tracking_data.comments:
See 1.1.070, 1.2.005, 3.3.024,
4.7.001 for Policies, Programs, and
Procedures. TCDRS 6 yr retention
period exceeds TSL 3 for internal
business practices.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to job descriptions such as summary of position responsibilities, requirements, and reporting relationships. Includes job and position descriptions.

tracking_data.comments:
TCDRS AC + 6 retention period
exceeds TSL AC + 4 for internal
business practices. Vital Record

series_metadata.series_title: Employment Selection Records Employee Recruitment and Selection - Personnel Files
series_metadata.series_description: Records providing a history of employment from initial hiring, including promotion and transfers. Includes employment application, letters of acceptance, and resumes.

tracking_data.comments:
CAUTION: Does not include
criminal history checks. TCDRS AC +
5 retention period exceeds TSL 2 yr
for internal business practices. See
3.1.019 for Performance
Evaluation, 3.1.024 for Medical
Reports, 3.4.007 for Medical
Leaves of Absence, 3.4.007 for Non-
Medical Leaves of Absence. See
3.1.013 HRE1220B, 3.1.038
HRE1220D, 3.3.011 HRE1220E Vital
Record

series_metadata.series_title: Time Off and/or Sick Leave Request Personnel Files - Medical Leaves of Absence
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to time taken off by an employee for medical reasons. Includes doctor's authorizations for time off and work directives, and FMLA requests.

TCDRS AC + 5 retention period
exceeds TSL FE + 3 for internal
business practices. Contains

3.4.002 Leave Status Reports

series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting individual employee and contractor medical history.

employment physical
examinations. See item number

File - Disability Retirement Medical
Records. See HRB1160 for
Employee Disability Insurance
Benefits - Medical Records. See

TCDRS AC + 5 retention period
exceeds TSL AC + 2 for internal
business practices.

series_metadata.series_title: Time Off and/or Sick Leave Request Personnel Files - Non-Medical Leaves of Absence
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to time taken off by an employee for reasons other than medical. Includes employee leave of absence requests and approvals.

tracking_data.comments:
TCDRS AC + 5 retention period
exceeds TSL FE + 3 for internal
business practices. Contains
records found within records series
3.4.002 Leave Status Reports

series_metadata.series_title: Performance Appraisals Personnel Files - Performance Evaluation
series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting specific employee's job performance. Includes reviews and evaluations by supervisors, recommendations for promotions and/or compensation, and corrective action plans.

tracking_data.comments:
TCDRS AC + 5 retention period
exceeds TSL 2 for internal business
practices.

series_metadata.series_title: Employee Deduction Authorizations Court and Governmental Orders
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to divorce, POAs, garnishment orders, and other levies received from the court regarding specific TCDRS employees. Includes the court order and related correspondence. Does not include court and government orders received regarding TCDRS members.

tracking_data.comments: Vital Record

series_metadata.series_description: Records submitted to state unemployment divisions containing employment and wage information for terminated employees who are requesting unemployment insurance work papers.

tracking_data.comments:
TCDRS FE + 5 retention period
exceeds TSL AC + 5 for internal
business practices.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to trustee fiduciary responsibilities and due diligence reviews. Includes trip files and investment manager visits.
Legal research and related workpapers for various investment subjects and projects. Excludes legal opinions documenting specific litigation.

tracking_data.comments:
See 1.1.048 for Hearings and
Litigation - Litigation

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to the determination and monitoring of salary structures, incentive programs, and job classifications and placement. Includes incentive pay programs documentation and wage and benefit surveys.

series_metadata.series_title: Other Fiscal Investments Banking - Custodian Operations
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to the custodian including changes in management, legal filings for tax reclaim, procedures, collateral information, STIF holdings updates, STIF Investment Guidelines, etc.

series_metadata.series_title: Office Procedures Investment Accounting Policies and Procedures Manual
series_metadata.series_description: Any internally distributed manual, guidelines, or similar records that establish standard office procedures for TCDRS. For example: Investments Department Policies and Procedures Manual.
Reports and documents providing useful accounting and financial information to management. These records are not part of accounting transaction processing or financial statement functions.

series_metadata.series_title: System Monitoring Records Technical Support Request
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to external customer and internal employee requests for technical support. These records identify the requestor's concern or request for support and identify TCDRS response and resolution. Includes help desk records, problem tacking documentation, telecommunications service requests.

tracking_data.comments:
TCDRS 3 yr retention period
exceeds TSL AV for internal
business practices.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to the registration and maintenance of TCDRS copyrights and trademarks. Includes copyright registrations and copyright permissions letters.

series_metadata.series_title: Litigation Files Hearings and Litigation - Litigation
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to threatened or asserted litigation regarding non-investment and investment matters. Includes pleadings, discovery, attorney work products, legal opinions, transcripts, exhibits, final judgments, settlements, court orders, and other documents specifying final terms, conditions, and decisions related to claims and litigation.

tracking_data.comments:
ARCHIVES NOTE Cases that set
legal precedent or exhibit historical
value will be evaluated by the
Archives and Information Services
Division of the Texas State Library
and Archives Commission for
archival preservation. TCDRS AC + 6
retention period exceeds TSL AC+ 1
for internal business practices.

series_metadata.series_description: Legal research and related workpapers for various subjects and projects related to TCDRS business. Excludes legal opinions documenting specific litigation.

tracking_data.comments:
See 1.1.048 for Hearings and
Litigation - Litigation See 1.1.027
for Proposed Legislation - Legal
Projects and Analysis - Proposed
Legislation and 1.1.014 for Legal
Projects and Analysis - Legal
Opinions.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to proposed, withdrawn, emergency, and adopted rules; open meeting notices; or any other documents required by law to be submitted to the Texas Register.

series_metadata.series_title: Proposed Legislation Legal Projects and Analysis - Proposed Legislation
series_metadata.series_description: Records documenting proposed legislation affecting TCDRS. Includes drafts analyses, workpapers, studies, fiscal notes, economic studies, bill analyses, etc.

tracking_data.comments:
See 1.1.000 for Legal Projects and
Analysis - General and 1.1.014 for
Legal Projects and Analysis - Legal
Opinions. TCDRS 5 yr. retention
period exceeds TSL AV for internal
business practices.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to payroll accounting, such as input records, summary statements and history. Includes payroll vouchers, reports, payroll registers, and direct deposit payroll plan applications. Includes withholding and payment to third parties of amounts garnished from TCDRS employee wages.

records series 3.2.004 Income
adjustment Authorizations and

Direct Deposit Authorizations and
TCDRS FE + 4 retention period
exceeds TSL AC + 4 for internal
business practices. Vital Record

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to TCDRS relations and interactions with other pension funds or industry and professional organizations, speaking engagements (legislative testimony), etc. Includes correspondence, presentations, papers, speeches created specifically with or for other pension funds, industry and professional associations, and speaking engagements.

AV to be determined by the
Director of Communications or the
owner of the Copy of Record See
PUB1040 for Public Relations,
COM1060 for State Publications

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to the analysis and summary of TCDRS insurance programs. Includes insurance policies coverage reports and insurance risk analysis.

AV to be determined by Director of
Administrative Services

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to legal proof of insurance coverage. Includes certificates of insurance provided to TCDRS by vendors, tenants and TCDRS issued insurance certificates.

Records related to claims filed against TCDRS for a wide variety of liability exposure, includes general claims and claims specific to physical damage or loss of property or the loss of the property's income-producing abilities. Also includes liability claim notifications and settlement documents.

See 5.4.001 for Insurance Claims -
Workers' Compensation Claims.

series_metadata.series_description: Records related to IRS 1099-R tax reporting for TCDRS annuitants and member withdrawals.

exceeds TSL AC + 4 for internal
business practices. Vital Record

series_metadata.series_description: Records supporting the taxes paid, withheld, and reported for payments to vendors or other miscellaneous 1099-Misc reporting. Records related to miscellaneous taxes and tax returns and work papers not covered elsewhere. Includes miscellaneous tax returns.

TCDRS AC + 6 retention period
exceeds TSL AC + 4 for internal
business practices. Vital Record

series_metadata.series_description: Records supporting the taxes paid, withheld, and reported for employees and members. May also include rates of taxation and quarterly reports to Texas Workforce Commission.
